verses.text: A haute aw, tu-in ka thugen hong ngai dih un. Note tungah a hong tungding lungkhamna hangin kapin thum un
Na neihsate uh muattumta a, na puante uh nget in netum khinta hi

Na ngun leh na khamte uh kekseu khinta hi. Hih kekseuna pen note langah teci suak a, mei in a kattum bangin na sa uh hong netum ding hi. Hih a hun nunung ciangin tu-a bangin a piang dingin neihsa a khol na hi uh hi
Na lo uh a hong khawhsakte a thaman pialo na hih manun tu-in amaute' phunna za un. Anla dingin na sawl uh mite' phunna Vanglian Topa in za khinta hi
Hih leitung na nuntak sungun uang nekin na noptat mahmah uh hi. Note hong kigawh hun ding kigin'na-in a kithausak phitphet na hi uh hi
A thuman mite mawhsakin na that uh a, amaute in na thu uh hong nial zolo uh hi.
Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, Topa hong pai matengin lungduai takin om un. Lo khote in zong a lo panun an a ngahtheihna dingun lungduai takin khuapi guah leh tuk guah a ngakna thu thei un
Note zong na lungduai un. Topa hong paiding hun naita ahih manin na lungsim uh na thahatsak un
Sanggamte aw, Pasian in note tungah thu hong khenkhak lohna dingin khatlekhat na kiphunsan kei un. Thukhen dingpa hong nai mahmah ta a, hong tung dektak ta hi
Sanggamte aw, Topa' min tawh thu a gen kamsangte na phawk un. Gimna a thuak laitakun lungduai-in a thuaknate uh na etteh un
Tua bangin a thuak mite a hampha mahmah hi, i ci hi. Job in a thuakna-ah a lungduaina na thei uh a, Topa in dikna leh hehpihna nei ahih manin a tawpna-ah Job tungah a piak thuphate na thei uh hi

Hih thute khempeuh banah, sanggamte aw, thu khat peuhpeuh na gen uh ciangin kiciam se kei un. Vantung ahi a, na khat peuhpeuh tawh ahi zongin kiciam kei un. Pasian' thukhenna na thuakkhak lohna dingun a hite, “Hi,” ci lel un la, a hilote, “Hilo,” na ci lel un
Lungkhamna a thuak na om uh leh thu na ngen un. A lungdam na om uh leh phatna la na sa un
A cina na om uh leh pawlpi upate sam un. Amaute in thu hong ngetsakin Topa min tawh sathau hong zut ding uh hi
Upna tawh thu a kinget ciangin Topa in cinate noptuamsakin, damsak ding a, mawhna nei ahih leh zong a mawhna maisak ding hi
Tua ahih manin na ci uh a damna dingin khatlekhat tungah na mawhna uh kipulakin thu na kingetsak ta un. Mihoihte' thungetna in vang nei a, na lianpi semzo hi
Elijah zong eite mah bangin mi mawkmawk hinapi-in, guah a zuklohna dingin lungsim takpi tawh thu a nget ciangin kum thum leh kum lang sung tua gamsungah guah zulo hi
Tua ciangin guah a zukna dingin thu ngenkik leuleu a, van panin guah hong zu-in, leitungah nektheih ding gah leh teh hong piangkik hi
Sanggamte aw, note khatpeuh thuman lampi panin pialkha-in, adang khatpeuh in thuman lampi-ah a tun' pihkik theih leh
tua bangin a khial mite lam manah a tun'pihkik mipa in a khial mite a sihna ding panin honkhia-in, mawhna tampi a maina dingin na a sempa ahihna thu na phawk un.
